title: Vercel Deployment Mission
description: A mission to publish your created page on the internet!

scenes.speech: Agent! This is a top-priority mission! Publish your work to the world! 🚀
scenes.title: Top-Priority Mission Briefing
scenes.content: Mission: Use Vercel to publish your web page on the internet! It will be visible to people all around the world!

scenes.speech: Things to check before publishing! Make sure there's no personal info!
scenes.title: Security Check
scenes.content: Before publishing on the internet, make sure there's no personal info! Ask your family to check too.
scenes.highlight:
Checklist:
❌ No full name
❌ No school name
❌ No address or phone number
✅ Family approval

scenes.speech: Vercel is like a magic express that delivers your page to the world!
scenes.title: What is Vercel?
scenes.content: Vercel is a service that automatically turns GitHub code into a website. It's free!
scenes.highlight:
How Vercel works:
GitHub → Vercel → Published on the internet
(Just add the code and it's automatic!)

scenes.speech: Log in to Vercel and deploy your project!
scenes.title: Deployment Plan Execution!
scenes.content: Open Vercel with your family, select your GitHub project, and deploy it!
scenes.highlight:
Steps:
1. Open vercel.com/new
2. Log in with GitHub
3. Select project
4. Deploy!
5. Check URL

scenes.speech: Mission accomplished! Get 480 points by submitting your URL! 🎉
scenes.title: Mission Complete!
scenes.content: You've created a page that people worldwide can access! Submit your public URL and screenshot to Slack!
